name: Motor Carriage Svc
recent_news: Per RocketReach (2026), Motor Carriage Service LLC is a small Beaverton, OR transportation/trucking entity with ~1 employee and ~$200K revenue; no school-district contracts surfaced.
fit_notes: Not a credible Summit tuck-in: micro-operator (<5 employees, ~$285K rev) with no evidence of school-bus or special-needs student transport contracts; appears to be a general motor-carrier sole proprietorship. Pass.

fit_notes: Not a Summit tuck-in. Name = limousine service; no evidence of school-bus or SPED contracts. PO-box-style address and 3 employees indicate single-vehicle livery. Pass.

name: Prime Dispatch LLC
recent_news: No public web presence located for a 'Prime Dispatch LLC' at 8401 NE Halsey, Portland OR. The Halsey corridor hosts several NEMT/livery micro-operators; name suggests a dispatching/brokerage rather than fleet operator.
fit_notes: Not a Summit tuck-in. No school-district customers identified; the name 'Dispatch' plus 4 employees / $285K revenue indicates either a small NEMT or a dispatching broker — neither is a yellow-bus operator. Pass.

name: Tammie's Helping Hands TRNSPTN
recent_news: Registered as an Assumed Business Name with Oregon Secretary of State on 2010-09-01; principal Tammie Mae Smith, original address 620 Bridge St, Box 263, Lafayette OR 97127. Listed in Oregon IDD resource directory as a transportation provider serving the disability community.
fit_notes: Not a Summit tuck-in. Micro IDD/disability transport provider (~4 employees, ~$285K rev) supporting Oregon DD waiver clients — adjacent to special-needs school transport but not a school-bus contractor. Pass.
